acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Pasadena CA PD and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy: All system access requires a valid reason and is stored indefinitely.
hotlist_policy: Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.

overview: Pasadena CA PD uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising on individual privacy. Pasadena CA PD utilizes retroactive search to solve crimes after they've occurred. Additionally, Pasadena CA PD utilizes real time alerting of hotlist vehicles to capture wanted criminals. In an effort to ensure proper usage and guardrails are in place, they have made the below policies and usage statistics available to the public.
success_stories: On May 27, 2024 at about 5:16 PM, a car-to-car shooting occurred in the City of Pasadena. Both cars, occupied with armed individuals, fled the shooting scene prior to police arrival. Utilizing Flock, officers were able to quickly identify both vehicles involved in the shooting, which led to an arrest of a repeat violent offender.
